titleStmt.title: SII 27.432: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 432. (A.R. No. 74 of 1939-40.) MĀRŪRU, KARKAL TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken Slab set up in front of the Pārśvanātha-basti.
This registers a gift of land by Pārśvadēvi Binnāṇi sister of Pāṇḍyapparasa Binnāṇi and others for the worship and offerings to Pārśvanātha, Ananta-tīrthakara, Chavis-tīrthakara and other deities.
It is dated Śaka 1520, Viḷaṁbi, Chaitra śu. 3, Thursday, Rohiṇi-nakshatra, corresponding to 1598 A.D., March 30. Thursday, f.d.n. ·07. The tithi was śu. 4. Cf. No. 431 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparama gaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōphalāṁchanaṁ jīyo trailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśā
sanaṁ 1 jayatyajayya māhātmyaṁ viśāsita su śāsanaṁ śāsanaṁ jmenama dbā si muktila
kṣmaikaśāsanaṁ svastiśrīmatsaka varṣa 1520 neya viḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada caitraśuddha 3 neya guruvāra
rōhiṇī nakṣatradallu pārśvanāthaśvāmiya Amrutapaḍige pāṁḍyapparasarāda biṁnāṇiyara sahajāteyarā
da pārśsadēviyavarāda biṁnāṇiyaru biṭṭakṣētra vivara Udaya madhyāhna saṁje hottu 3 kke dina 1 kke baḷḷa 6 lekka
dalli kāla 1 kke Akkimūḍe 45 yidakkekṣētra mārūrallu sareḷiṁjada bāḷu kallimareṁba bayalugadde 1
Ada kuḷa beṭṭu saha Akki baḷa 45 dara lekkadalakki mūḍe 15 Aṁṇaṁta beṭṭiheggaḍe bāḷinalli madvāraneṁba baya
lagadde 1 daralli Akki mūḍe 15 maḷakāṁtu guttu bayalagadde 1 beṭṭu gadde 1 Adakke Akkimūḍe 16 hāladhā
re vivara kūlyara biṁnāṇi hesaralu hāla dhāre 2 hiriya pāṁḍyapparasara hā 1 padumaladēviyara hā 1 du
pāṁḍyapparasarāda biṁnāṇiyara hā 1 pārśvadēviyarāda biṁnāṇiyara hā 1 Aṁtu hā6ke biṭṭa kṣē
tra baṁnilada bayala gadde 2 Asaḷa beṭṭu saha Akki mūḍe 12 Akṣatephala vastu kāla 1 kke kallilada guttu ba
bayalagadde 20 lu Akki mū 3 Aṁtu bage 3 kke mūḍe 64 padmaladēvi
yaru yirisida Anaṁtatīrtthakaruge taṁḍake kṣētra puce mu re ḷi saṁkarana bayalagaddeya
llu Akki mū 3 bhavaṁti dēhāra 3 taṁḍakkekṣētra siḷādimēlaṁṭṭibāḷu jayareṁba bayala
mattaṁ 4 taṁḍadēhārakke Amrutapaḍi kuḍemaṇiyaru muṁcemare
dēva biṁnāṇiyaru karmanirjarānōpi Udyāpaneya mūḍi paṁcapara
nāthana pratimege Anaṁtanōhiyamāḍi Anaṁtatīrtyakara pratime
time 1 matte pratime 2 Aṁtu pratime 6 rakke Amrutapaḍi kṣētrakallila
ṭusaha Akkimū 10 �yo Akkivoḷage kālavoṁdaṁkke gaṁda ḍadadhū
ṣōḍa śabhāvanege maraṇada Anaṁta bhaṁḍāri guttinalli A mū 30 Aṁtu A
ṁṇege nākōṭisaṁkara bhaṭṭina bāḷinalli varaha ga 2 guṇadaṁta bhaṭṭana ga 2 A
ge 5 tīrtakaru 24 taṁḍake Amrutapaḍiya vivara kuṁṭuḍeleṁba guttu bayala gadde 1
ṁtaḷi paṁñabāḷabiṭṭu gaddeyalli Akkimū 2 hoḷeyiṁdāce sudhekārabā
ḍḍe beṭṭu saha bāḷa Akki mū 12 Aṁtu A mū 24 cavistīrtha ṁkarapratime 1 kke Akki mū
stirtakara pratime 1 A mū 2 siddhara pratime 2 Amū 2 Aṁtu pratime 4 Akkimū 8 A
ladallu bayalagadde 4 Amu Þ paṁcaparamēṣṭiga pratime 1 pāṁrśvanāthana biṁba 1 si
1 caṁdranāthana biṁba 1 yidakke Amrutapaḍi vivarake pāḍiyallu baṁgahosabana bāḷi
lagadeyalu A mū 3 sidacakradārādhanege talepāḍi kāṁtakana bāḷinalli Amū 4 kaṇiṁja
kaṁbbeda baḷiyeṁba bayala gadeyalli A mu 7 mārūralu yiralaṁjeyeṁba bayala gade 1
beṭṭu sahaamū 2 Aṁtu A mū 14 pāṭhaḍyapparasarāda biṁnāṇiya ra hesaralu naḍava hāladhāre
pārśvadēviyarāda biṁnāṇiyahesaralu naḍava hāladhāre 1 yidake soṁpavara baḷina bayalaga
deyallu Amū 4 [] nilalu Amūḍe 1 hāladhāre 1 toḍara bāḷoktalu bhaṁḍariyali baruvayeṇṇehā
1 yidana prativarṣaṁ naḍasuvaṁtāgi hiraṁṇadyodaka dhārāpūrakavāgi Ācaṁdrākkasthā
yi yāgi mamāḍida dharmma śāsanadaṁ dharmma śāsanava Uḷu pidaṁ thavara Ujaṁtagiriyali sāvira jinabiṁba
vanaḷupida dōhake hōharu vāraṇāsiyalli sāvirakapileya koṁda drōhake hōharu
Apojege kēḍu nenadavaru yi bhūmiUḷakālake narakada dukavanuṁbaru .
Digital edition of SII 27.432 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
